sentence: 请按照医嘱控制好用药剂量。
pinyin: Qǐng ànzhào yīzhǔ kòngzhì hǎo yòngyào jìliàng.
english: Please control the medication dosage according to the doctor's instructions.

sentence: 多运动有助于加快新陈代谢。
pinyin: Duō yùndòng yǒu zhù yú jiākuài xīnchén dàixiè.
english: Exercising more helps speed up your metabolism.

sentence: 他租了一艘游艇在海湾游玩。
pinyin: Tā zū le yī sōu yóutǐng zài hǎiwān yóuwán.
english: He rented a yacht to cruise around the bay.

sentence: 警察给嫌疑人戴上了手铐。
pinyin: Jǐngchá gěi xiányírén dài shàng le shǒukào.
english: The police put handcuffs on the suspect.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了一颗旧式手榴弹模型。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le yī kē jiùshì shǒuliúdàn móxíng.
english: A model of an old-style hand grenade is on display at the museum.
